positiveClaims: The existing Word evidence claim gate is product-bound as a Review Bridge claim boundary.
A Word evidence claim can be accepted only when a valid Word evidence packet is present, the evidence hash matches, and requested coverage is not wider than packet coverage.
Accepted Word evidence coverage classes are textExact, commentAnchor, and structuralManual.
Missing evidence packet, invalid evidence packet, invalid claim, hash mismatch, and coverage-exceeded cases block the claim.
The binding is evidence and claim truth only; it is not content import, review import, apply, export, or storage truth.
The next planned lane remains Google Docs evidence claim binding after this contour is delivered.
nonClaims: No Word review import is claimed.
No Word layout parity is claimed.
No full DOCX fidelity is claimed.
No full DOCX review import is claimed.
No exact apply from Word or DOCX is claimed.
No manuscript write is performed by Word evidence claim binding.
No project truth write is performed by Word evidence claim binding.
No receipt or recovery evidence is created by Word evidence claim binding.
No DOCX import safe-create behavior is changed.
No DOCX export behavior is changed.
No import/export MVP closeout is widened.
No PDF, EPUB, HTML, Mindmap, cloud, sync, accounts, cross-platform readiness, or Y9 admission is claimed.
layerDecisions: Evidence layer validates packet and claim only.
Claim binding is not a parser and does not inspect Word files.
Claim binding is not content import and does not create scenes.
Claim binding is not Review import and does not activate a Review session.
Claim binding is not an apply plan and does not authorize mutation.
Claim binding is not safe write and does not create receipt or recovery evidence.
Claim binding is not export and does not alter DOCX output.
Review Bridge may reference accepted claims as bounded evidence, but accepted claims do not become project truth.

agentAudits.finding: Runtime diff not needed; bounded status, docs, governance, and contract guard are sufficient for this claim binding contour.
No direct overclaim found; main protected boundary is avoiding Word evidence claims as proof of import, apply, export, storage, UI, or release readiness.
No overclaim or layer mixing found in the current diff; adjacent failures classify as dirty-tree or test-hygiene rather than product regression.
